heroHeadline: Dilling Siege Enters Day 3; MSF: 3,396 Sexual Violence Survivors in Darfur; Blue Nile Front Expands
heroSubtitle: RSF-SPLM-N siege of Dilling (S. Kordofan) continues with Habila road severed and basic commodities gone; RSF 'shifts ambitions south' threatening Geissan, Ed Damazin, and the Roseires Dam after Kurmuk capture; UN condemns escalating drone attacks on civilians as possible war crimes; MSF documents 3,396 sexual violence survivors (97% women and girls) in Darfur Jan 2024–Nov 2025; total displacement into Ed Damazin since Eid reaches 73,000
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, Darfur24, AFP, Anadolu Agency, The National, UN News, UN Security Council
